whyUs.description: Senior teams, a proprietary methodology and hands-on partnership at every stage. We turn technological complexity into measurable transformation for your business.

about.pageSubtitle: Meet the team and story behind GoTechy

essence.subtitle: The mission that grounds us and the vision that pushes us forward.

officesBanner.subtitle: Based in Buenos Aires and Santa Fe — delivering across the region.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Accelerate the digital transformation of leading companies in LATAM with world-class technology solutions, combining technical expertise, AI and cutting-edge development.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: Be the technology partner of reference in LATAM, recognized for the quality of our delivery, the innovation of our solutions and the measurable impact on every client.

items.title: Technical excellence
items.body: Real depth across every technology we master, not surface-level consulting.

items.title: Measurable results
items.body: Every project is measured in business value delivered.

items.title: Close collaboration
items.body: We work as an extension of the client's team.

items.title: Responsible innovation
items.body: We adopt the latest that brings value, not novelty for its own sake.

about.teamSubtitle: The people behind every project: real seniority, commitment and zero rotation on key accounts.

chatbot.title: Techy — GoTechy Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi! 👋 I'm Techy, GoTechy's virtual assistant. How can I help you?
suggestions: I want to book a meeting
chatbot.busy: I'm getting a lot of questions right now. Please try again in a few seconds.
chatbot.error: I couldn't answer right now. Try again, or write to us at /contacto.
chatbot.disclaimer: AI-generated answers — they may contain mistakes.
